hero.name: Lucas Cavalcante
hero.title: Data Analyst | AI & Machine Learning | Computer Vision
hero.description: Data Analyst with experience in AI, automation, and digital marketing projects. Specialized in developing chatbots, interactive dashboards, time series and geospatial data pipelines, and implementing SEO/SEM strategies.

portfolio.subtitle: Check out some of my recent Data Science and AI projects

0.title: LabGas Manager - Laboratory Management
0.description: Dashboard for managing gas cylinders and analyzed elements in a chemistry laboratory, using Flask with Jinja2 for frontend and Supabase as the database.

1.title: Sales Analysis Dashboard
1.description: Interactive dashboard developed with Streamlit for exploratory sales data analysis, with dynamic filters and advanced visualizations.

2.title: Automotive Shop Chatbot
2.description: Customer service chatbot for automotive shop using RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) with LangChain, Ollama Cloud and Streamlit. Includes login system, Supabase database and guardsrails for topic validation and injection detection.

3.title: Human Recognition Dashboard
3.description: Interactive dashboard for human silhouette recognition using LBP + Machine Learning with real-time detection via webcam or IP camera, creative filters, and detailed metrics.

4.title: Geospatial Data Pipeline
4.description: ETL pipeline for processing and analyzing geospatial data, with interactive map visualizations and automated reports.

5.title: Time Series Forecasting System
5.description: Machine Learning model for demand and sales forecasting using advanced time series techniques with LSTM and Prophet architectures.

6.title: Sentiment Analysis with NLP
6.description: Complete sentiment analysis system for product reviews and customer feedback with interactive visualization and automated reports.

7.title: Multi-Model QA Analysis Dashboard
7.description: A robust, modular, and parallel pipeline for processing and analyzing responses from multiple Question Answering (QA) models using the Hugging Face platform.

8.title: Automotive Shop ERP
8.description: Complete management system for automotive workshops with client and vehicle registration, service orders, inventory control, financials and more. Built with Next.js 15 and Supabase.

9.title: Paraiso Frames Landing Page
9.description: Institutional landing page for audiovisual production company with modern and responsive design, built with React, TypeScript and SCSS.

10.title: Mako® Industrial Solutions
10.description: Institutional website for industrial engineering solutions company focused on automation, projects and maintenance. Built with Next.js 16, React 19 and Tailwind CSS.

7.title: Artificial Intelligence Research Fellow
7.5: Statistics and Applied Artificial Intelligence for Business.

2.title: Data Analyst

2.3: Performance of Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) and calculation of descriptive statistics.
2.4: Generation of interactive dashboards and reports for senior management using Power BI.

3.title: Data Analyst
3.1: Definition of scope and data modeling (ERD) for a project in the Ceará fashion market.
3.2: Collection, cleaning, and preparation of datasets using Python and analysis libraries.
3.3: Performance of Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) and calculation of descriptive statistics.
3.4: Implementation of machine learning model (Random Forest) with metric evaluation.
3.5: Generation of interactive dashboards and reports for senior management using Streamlit.

4.title: Marketing and Commercial Analyst
4.1: Planning and management of digital campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads) with KPI monitoring.
4.2: Implementation of SEO and SEM strategies, resulting in increased organic traffic.
4.3: Creation and editing of audiovisual content for social media and sales funnels.
4.5: Support to the commercial team in customer prospecting and retention.

5.title: Marketing Analyst | Marketing Assistant
5.1: Development and monitoring of promotional campaigns.
5.2: Implementation of SEO/SEM strategies and content management for website and social media.
5.3: Creation of graphic content and maintenance of digital communication channels.

6.title: IT and Network Technician
6.1: Assembly, maintenance and configuration of IT infrastructure (computers, servers, TCP/IP networks, Wi-Fi).
6.2: Remote and on-site technical support, software installation and access permissions.
6.3: Technical consulting and preparation of bids for equipment procurement.

labels.earlyStoppedDesc: Early stopping after 10 epochs without improvement

settings.title: Hyperparameters
settings.description: Adjust these to control the training process
settings.learningRateDesc: Step size for gradient descent. Higher = faster but may overshoot.
settings.momentumDesc: SGD momentum factor (0-1). Higher = more momentum.
settings.hiddenNeuronsDesc: Neurons in hidden layer. Larger = more capacity.

components.trainingSimDesc: Simulated MLP training with gradient descent

0.question: What is the average delivery time for a project?
0.answer: The timeframe varies from 3 to 5 weeks, depending on the complexity of the project. Smaller projects can be delivered in less time.

1.question: Do you work on-site?
1.answer: I serve on-site only in Fortaleza and Metropolitan Region. For other locations, I offer remote services.

2.question: What technologies do you use?
2.answer: I work mainly with Python and its libraries: Pandas and Scikit-learn for analysis and machine learning, Streamlit and Flask for web apps, LangChain and Hugging Face for NLP, OpenCV for computer vision, and Streamlit and Folium for data visualization in time series and geospatial data.

3.question: What is your professional experience?
3.answer: I have practical experience in small and medium-sized companies, working in institutional/educational sectors and also in the industrial sector. I have worked on data analysis projects, chatbot development, dashboards and data pipelines.
